title: The Tarot Pact
description: Adventure and magic and tech and progression! A love letter to the twin communities of Gigi's Habitat and Zynd's Legion, created by Zynd!
body:
Hey, I'm Zynd Legion, demon of impulsive thoughts turned Vtuber. This modpack is for the sweet humans who follow me, and for the community who supports Gigi the sheep, who gave me hope.

My main goals with this pack, in order of importance to me;
- Functional in multiplayer on a reasonable server.
- A reasonable framerate even on weaker computers.
- Fixes for a lot of annoying jank.
- A warm cozy feeling.
- RPG content and progression.
- The potential for huge factories and massive automation.
- A sense of reward and wonder while exploring; no huge castles unless there's useful loot inside!
- A feeling of building a town with other players.

This pack has a dedicated server, open to followers of The Habitat and The Legion! It's most of the reason I made this pack, check it out!

Follow me at Twitch.tv/ZyndLegion
Follow Gigi at Twitch.tv/Fluffans
